description: Mercantile memorandum. One section begins "tadhkira wa-ʿamal...." Dating: Probably 11th or 12th century. Two pieces of parchment have been stitched together (the thread is still preserved). Mentions goods such as oil and kohl, but few details are preserved. Verso is blank. (Information from Goitein’s index card)
description_he: תזכיר מסחרי על קלף; המאה ה-11 או ה-12; שני קטעי קלף תפורים יחד; מוזכרים שמן ופיח עיניים; ורסו ריק
